solution:
-- === SQL & Database Design - Perpustakaan ===

CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS perpustakaan;
USE perpustakaan;

CREATE TABLE penulis (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    nama VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    negara VARCHAR(50)
);

CREATE TABLE buku (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    judul VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    penulis_id INT,
    tahun INT,
    stok INT DEFAULT 1,
    FOREIGN KEY (penulis_id) REFERENCES penulis(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

CREATE TABLE anggota (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    nama VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    alamat TEXT,
    telp VARCHAR(20),
    tgl_daftar DATE DEFAULT (CURRENT_DATE)
);

CREATE TABLE peminjaman (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    buku_id INT,
    anggota_id INT,
    tgl_pinjam DATE DEFAULT (CURRENT_DATE),
    tgl_kembali DATE,
    status ENUM('dipinjam', 'kembali') DEFAULT 'dipinjam',
    FOREIGN KEY (buku_id) REFERENCES buku(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (anggota_id) REFERENCES anggota(id)
);

INSERT INTO penulis VALUES
(1, 'Pramoedya Ananta Toer', 'Indonesia'),
(2, 'Andrea Hirata', 'Indonesia'),
(3, 'Tere Liye', 'Indonesia');

INSERT INTO buku VALUES
(1, 'Bumi Manusia', 1, 1980, 3),
(2, 'Laskar Pelangi', 2, 2005, 5),
(3, 'Hafalan Shalat Delisa', 3, 2005, 2);

-- Query: Cari buku dengan penulisnya
SELECT b.judul, p.nama as penulis, b.tahun, b.stok
FROM buku b
JOIN penulis p ON b.penulis_id = p.id;

-- Query: Buku yang paling banyak dipinjam
SELECT b.judul, COUNT(p.id) as total_pinjam
FROM buku b
LEFT JOIN peminjaman p ON b.id = p.buku_id
GROUP BY b.id
ORDER BY total_pinjam DESC;

solution:
# === Data Science - Analisis Dataset ===
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

np.random.seed(42)
data = {
    'nama': ['Budi', 'Siti', 'Agus', 'Dewi', 'Rudi', 'Maya', 'Eko', 'Rina'],
    'usia': np.random.randint(18, 35, 8),
    'nilai': np.random.randint(60, 100, 8),
    'jam_belajar': np.random.uniform(1, 8, 8).round(1),
    'lulus': [True, True, False, True, False, True, True, False]
}
df = pd.DataFrame(data)

print("=== Data Awal ===")
print(df)
print()
print("=== Statistik Deskriptif ===")
print(df.describe())
print()
print("=== Rata-rata Nilai per Status Lulus ===")
print(df.groupby('lulus')['nilai'].mean())
print()
print("=== Korelasi ===")
print(df[['usia', 'nilai', 'jam_belajar']].corr())
print()

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 4))
plt.subplot(131)
plt.scatter(df['jam_belajar'], df['nilai'])
plt.xlabel('Jam Belajar')
plt.ylabel('Nilai')
plt.title('Jam Belajar vs Nilai')

plt.subplot(132)
df['nilai'].hist(bins=10)
plt.xlabel('Nilai')
plt.ylabel('Frekuensi')
plt.title('Distribusi Nilai')

plt.subplot(133)
lulus_count = df['lulus'].value_counts()
plt.pie(lulus_count.values, labels=lulus_count.index, autopct='%1.1f%%')
plt.title('Tingkat Kelulusan')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

print("=== Insight ===")
avg_grade = df['nilai'].mean()
avg_hours = df['jam_belajar'].mean()
pass_rate = df['lulus'].mean() * 100
print(f"Rata-rata nilai: {avg_grade:.1f}")
print(f"Rata-rata jam belajar: {avg_hours:.1f} jam")
print(f"Tingkat kelulusan: {pass_rate:.0f}%")
